docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF NOBARI, NUCHINE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-02-2022 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUL-07-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 DUE TO THE UNAVAILABILITY OF A JUDICIAL OFFICER TO HEAR THIS MATTER. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $75) SERVED APR-26-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BARLOW, PATRICIA
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF NOBARI, NUCHINE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY NOBARI, NUCHINE AS TO DEFENDANT BARLOW, PATRICIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-10-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-10-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-02-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF NUSCHINE NOBARI IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT PATRICIA BARLOW IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $125 TO THE PLAINTIFF FOR COSTS. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE JUN 2ND HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. DEFENDANT (LEFT) EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
